decisions.rationale: Valid edge-case UX gap: when enrollment currentSessionId matches ?session= but fetchPathSession returns null, SessionCompletionRoute keeps isVisible true and hides bTJDf while rendering an empty bTJAG/bTJAB shell after loading. criteria_audit AC-1/AC-2 and functional_audit FV-1–FV-4 pass on the happy path; decompose scope does not require error recovery or redirect. No downstream MOD-DRSAM-PATHS items depend on failure handling. Defer inline error or param-clear fallback to a polish/API hardening wave.

PATHS-07 AC-3 explicitly scopes a frontend stub for ScheduleAPIEvent bTJCM parity; decompose scope documents read-only pathsession surfaces with no persistence. schedulePathSessionCompletion console.info stub satisfies AC-3 and criteria_audit pass. Persistence and pathanswer writes belong to API-06 per module decompose depends_on chain — not a PATHS-07 rewrite gap.

PATHS-01 triage C-2 carried integration-test expectation to PATHS-07, but PATHS-07 decompose acceptance_criteria cover routing, gating, and submit orchestration only — no test AC. Behavioral checks FV-1–FV-4 and ui_evidence all pass. Automated React Router test for bTJDf vs bTJAB toggle and post-submit param clear is valuable backlog; does not block module completion with no further PATHS depends_on items.

Duplicate data-bubble-id bTItY on EnrollmentFloatingBar and PathsGridPanel is a PATHS-02/06 hierarchy artifact; PATHS-06 triage C-1 already deferred marker consolidation. PATHS-07 URL session matching is store-driven via pathsEnrollmentStore currentSessionId — ui_evidence for bTItY passes and named ui_ref parity is functionally satisfied. Retain single canonical bTItY on EnrollmentFloatingBar as optional IR hierarchy polish in a later wave.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, 0 blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. C-1 deferred: empty-overlay recovery when fetchPathSession fails after enrollment match. C-2 accepted: AC-3 frontend stub intentional; persistence deferred to API-06-ai-confidence-level-trigger. C-3 deferred: integration tests remain backlog (PATHS-01 carry-forward). C-4 deferred: duplicate bTItY marker polish (PATHS-06 carry-forward).
